author: IGN YouTube
text:
Destiny 2: The Collection - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the Announcement Trailer for Destiny 2: The Collection, the definitive edition of the hit first-person action shooter developed by Bungie. Players can gain access to a suite of content for Destiny 2, including all available expansions and content packs, in addition to four reward passes and access to endgame pursuits such as Raids, Dungeons, and more. Destiny 2: The Collection is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Tales of Eternia: Remastered - Official Announcement Trailer | Nintendo Direct June 2026
Take a look at the Tales of Eternia: Remastered announcement trailer for this upcoming remaster of the classic RPG. A classic adventure across Inferia and Celestia returns in Tales of Eternia Remastered. Relive the unforgettable journey of Reid, Farah, and the rest of the party, bridging the divide between the two worlds. Tales of Eternia Remastered will be available on Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5 (PS5), PlayStation 4 (PS4), Xbox Series X/S, and Steam on October 16, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Xbox Game Pass Lost Millions of Subscribers After Price Hike - IGN Daily Fix
Microsoft says Xbox Game Pass lost "millions of subscribers" after it increased prices by 50% with a price hike in October last year. Plus, the rumors were true: Nintendo's The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake for Switch 2 is real. All that and more in today's Daily Fix.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Kingdom Hearts Collection [1-3] - Official Announcement Trailer | Nintendo Direct June 2026
Don't miss the Announcement Trailer for Kingdom Hearts Collection , a new collection of the iconic action-adventure RPG series developed by Square Enix. Players can gain access to an incredible value for the franchise, consisting of KINGDOM HEARTS HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX, KINGDOM HEARTS HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue, and KINGDOM HEARTS III + Re Mind (DLC). The Kingdom Hearts Collection is launching on October 8 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Duskbloods - Official Closed Network Test Trailer | Nintendo Direct June 2026
In this new multiplayer action game, you’ll take on the role of the Bloodsworn and fight against – and alongside – up to seven other players with unique weapons and abilities. Transcend humanity with blood-based powers that transform your character and combat style as you battle to secure the coveted First Blood. The Duskbloods launches exclusively on Nintendo Switch 2 in 2026. Players can learn more about the closed network test for the game, coming in summer 2026!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Jujutsu Kaisen Rumble: Survivaton - Official Announcement Trailer | Nintendo Direct June 2026
Survive, Exorcise, Change the game. Watch the Jujutsu Kaisen Rumble: Survivaton announcement trailer for this upcoming survivors royale where you battle cursed spirits and rivals, growing stronger throughout the match. Outscore your rivals and fight to be the last player standing victorious. Jujutsu Kaisen Rumble: Survivaton will be available on Steam, Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X|S in 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stellar Blade - Official Nintendo Switch 2 Trailer | Nintendo Direct June 2026
Don't miss the Nintendo Switch 2 Trailer for Stellar Blade, the hit third-person action game developed by Shift Up. Unravel the mysteries of Earth's downfall in Stellar Blade, coming to Nintendo Switch in 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Star Fox Remake New Gameplay: Full Mission Playthrough
During the Nintendo Direct for June 2026, Nintendo dropped a playable demo for the upcoming Star Fox 64 Remake. In this demo, we play through the Meteo mission, or Asteroid Field as it’s referenced elsewhere. The demo also gives us a glimpse at new Star Fox cutscenes and what to expect for the expanded story beats that exist across the whole game. Here’s roughly 10 Minutes Star Fox gameplay.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Feeling Queer and Feeling Seen: Awakenings, Inspiration and Representation In 2026 | IGN Live
Host Michael Peyton interviews actor David Menkin, writer Dani Carr, and illustrator Bree Williams at IGN Live's 2026 Pride Panel. Check out their upcoming projects this year and see what they had to say about queer characters, inspiration and more. Presented by upcoming queer horror film Leviticus, releasing June 19 in theaters.

#IGN #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official Season 8.5 Dev Overview
Take a look at the Season 8.5 Dev Vision Vol. 18 for Marvel Rivals, the hit team-based action game developed by NetEase Games. Players can get the rundown on new changes, a brand-new map, the newest hero Cyclops, and so much more. Season 8.5 for Marvel Rivals kicks off on June 12 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
What's Your Favorite Gaming Memory? - XBOX 25th Anniversary
In celebration of Xbox’s 25th Anniversary, Fanta and Xbox teamed up to release special-edition cans showcasing iconic characters from legendary gaming franchises. The collection features characters from Call of Duty, Halo, World of Warcraft, Forza Horizon 6, and Diablo IV, which introduces a new flavor, Crimson Sour Cherry. We took the opportunity to surprise IGN staff with these limited-edition cans while looking back at the impact Xbox has made on the gaming landscape throughout its 25-year history.
 
Presented by Fanta.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official Cyclops Character Reveal Trailer
Take a look at the Cyclops Character Reveal Trailer for Marvel Rivals, the hit team-based free-to-play action game developed by NetEase Games. Players will embody the founding member and leader of the X-Men, a new Duelist being added to the roster. Lay down damage with his specialized ruby quartz visor to dish out channeled force through his eyes as the ultimate protector of Mutantkind. Catch Cyclops in action on Marvel Rivals, launching with Season 8.5 on June 12 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).
